meaning: n.榛戠摝娲涗汉[璇璢,甯岀摝缃椾汉[璇璢
examples: The loan application is part of a fictitious banking application called Jivaro.
Jivaro Bank has registered two internal endpoints in the Jivaro service registry.
For the subscriber and consumer-side governance, Jivaro Bank has established the following policies.
Chicago's Field Museum has a collection of shrunken heads made by an Ecuadorian tribe once known as the Jivaro.
